html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

The Brightshade Bomb is a ranged weapon exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It is crafted at the Brightsmithy with 4 Pure Brilliance, 4 Brightshade Husks and 1 Infused Moon Shard.

Each craft of the Brightshade Bomb yields 6 bombs. Upon right-clicking with the Brightshade Bomb equipped, the character will throw the bomb, dealing 200 planar damage to enemies and destroying any structures in the explosion. Planar damage pierces through the protection of worn armor and planar entity protection.

Tips

  • Grazers, when materialized, can be blown up in one explosion using Brightshade Bombs. This can make Ryftstals safer to mine while they're temporarily dematerialized.

Trivia

  • Regardless of if PvP is enabled or not, it cannot damage other players, but it can still damage the thrower. Because the bomb deals planar damage, this is enough to instantly kill even most armored Characters, only excluding ones with more than 200 HP or possessing significant planar protection.

Gallery

  • Explosion.

–Wilson

–Willow

–Woodie

–Maxwell
“I have made the plant's power my own.”
–Wigfrid

–Webber

–Warly

–Wormwood
“Anyone call for a demolition crew?”
–Winona
“This will be the start of some wonderful pranks.”
–Wortox
“Hee-hee-hee... boom!!”
–Wurt
“If only I could use it in my slingshot.”
–Walter
“This should end a fight quickly.”
–Wanda
The Brightshade Bomb is a ranged weapon exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It is crafted at the Brightsmithy with 4 Pure Brilliance, 4 Brightshade Husks and 1 Infused Moon Shard.
Each craft of the Brightshade Bomb yields 6 bombs. Upon right-clicking with the Brightshade Bomb equipped, the character will throw the bomb, dealing 200 planar damage to enemies and destroying any structures in the explosion. Planar damage pierces through the protection of worn armor and planar entity protection.

Grazers, when materialized, can be blown up in one explosion using Brightshade Bombs. This can make Ryftstals safer to mine while they're temporarily dematerialized.

The '''Brightshade Bomb''' is a ranged [[weapon]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. It is crafted at the [[Brightsmithy]] with 4 [[Pure Brilliance]], 4 [[Brightshade Husk]]s and 1 [[Infused Moon Shard]].

Each craft of the Brightshade Bomb yields 6 bombs. Upon right-clicking with the Brightshade Bomb equipped, the character will throw the bomb, dealing 200 [[Planar Damage|planar damage]] to enemies and destroying any structures in the explosion. Planar damage pierces through the protection of worn [[armor]] and [[Planar Entity Protection|planar entity protection]].

=={{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* [[Grazer]]s, when materialized, can be blown up in one explosion using Brightshade Bombs. This can make [[Ryftstal|Ryftstals]] safer to mine while they're temporarily dematerialized.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Regardless of if PvP is enabled or not, it cannot damage other players, but it can still damage the thrower. Because the bomb deals planar damage, this is enough to instantly kill even most armored [[Characters]], only excluding ones with more than 200 HP or possessing significant [[Planar Damage|planar protection]].
